projectDescription: A Go library providing machine learning-assisted web application firewall mechanisms that combine OWASP Core Rule Set (ModSecurity) with ML models to identify, analyze, and prevent web attacks while reducing false positives.
keyFeatures: ML-assisted WAF analysis combining ModSecurity CRS with machine learning models
Plugin-based architecture supporting custom model and decision plugins
Support for sync, async, and remote model execution modes
NATS-based messaging for distributed async model processing
Per-transaction analysis lifecycle with concurrent model execution
Granular HTTP payload analysis (request headers, body, response headers, response body)
publicApiSurface: Analyze(modelsTypeAsString, transactionId string, payload pluginmanager.HTTPPayload, models []string) error
CheckTransaction(transactionID, decisionPlugin string, wafParams map[string]string) (bool, error)
configstore.ModelPluginType enum (RequestHeaders, RequestBody, AllRequest, ResponseHeaders, ResponseBody, AllResponse, Everything)
